title: ActionProposalSchema
description: A single proposed action from an Execution Backend (Claude Agent SDK, Hermes, OpenClaw, ...). Backends may only ever produce proposals — never act directly. This document is what gets hashed, matched against rules, and evaluated by the Policy Engine.

description.description: Human-readable summary, for audit/UI only. Never used in matching or decision logic.

proposed_by.description: Identifier of the execution backend/adapter that produced this proposal, e.g. 'claude-agent-sdk', 'hermes', 'openclaw'.

paths.description: Filesystem paths this action reads/writes/deletes, if any. Empty array if not path-relevant.

target_branch.description: Git branch this action targets, if any (e.g. for git_push, git_merge).

payload.description: Action-type-specific structured details (e.g. command string, diff summary, commit message). Free-form but must be canonically serializable.
